title: DevLocators
description: Dev-team-supplied (or external-LLM-produced) mapping of locator-constant names to real selectors. When this file is discoverable (via --dev-locators flag, WORCA_T_DEV_LOCATORS env var, or `<sut>/.worca-t/dev-locators.json` convention path), the JIT runtime plugin consults it BEFORE the LLM resolver. Selectors are verified at first use via Playwright `locator.count()`; mismatches fall through to the resolver and log `dev_selector_mismatch`.

version.description: Schema version, e.g. "1.0". Allows the loader to handle future shape changes.

source.description: Free-text identifier of who produced this file (e.g. "dev-team", "external-llm", "parent-worca", "manual"). For traceability in the Step 10 report.

locators.description: Mapping of constant name (the same name codegen used in the locators module, e.g. LOGIN_BUTTON) to its dev-supplied selector + metadata.

selector.description: The selector to use. XPath is rejected at load time (the loader filters out entries whose selector starts with `//` or `xpath=`).

intent.description: Optional human description of what this locator targets. Used for traceability; not required for the runtime to use the selector.

page_url.description: Optional URL/path of the page where this element lives. Informational.
